contract_summary: First semantic diff enrichment target for deriving structured change interpretation from deterministic Git diff inputs without replacing canonical Git-state artifacts.

in_scope: semantic diff enrichment from explicit diff-state inputs
review-basis support artifacts for higher-order workflows

determinism_rules: output must name the upstream diff-state artifact it enriches
output must not redefine or overwrite canonical Git facts
output shape must remain stable for unchanged input artifacts
notes: This is a target-contract draft only and does not implement sem.
sem is downstream of deterministic Git fact capture and must remain enrichment-side.
